chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Applications 581 and 582 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 2856/2014 2. For hearing of main case 14.10.2025 These reference applications are pending since 2014 without any progress. Applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant department is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
